message:
As I walk through my hostel gates
Awoken by my roomie's charades
I look out into the sea of masses
Hoping to catch a glimpse of those eyelashes
Wishing to see those pretty eyes
Eyes, dark as the depths of the void
The only pair that'll ever make me sigh
Cause such is the intensity of emotions
Hidden behind those eyes

Your hair, kept tightly knit, when set free
Leaves me mad with glee
The face, ever so kindled
Make my words jumbled
Your mouth ever so smiling
Leaves my heart shivering
And ooh the child like curiosity of yours
So innocent and soo pure
And yet the mischief behind those eyes
Makes me question your innocence twice

Ohh how I yearn for our time together
Hoping we could just be with each other
Your face, radiant like the sun
Gives me the conundrum
How could I ever be good enough
To be with the one chosen by the gods
Crafted by creation itself, meant to be the one
A thousand women walk over these paths
And yet your footsteps remain steadfast,
Leading me always to your heart

I don't know how it shall end, where it shall stop
But I wanna journey through this, together with you and I hope...... so do you
